{{Quote|HT-2200 with volatile cargo inbound. Repair droids standby for assessment.|An announcement onboard Hauler's Keep|audio=HT2000WithVolatileCargo-Outlaws.flac|<ref name="Outlaws" />}}
A '''HT-2200''' was a model of [[starship]] that was capable of transporting cargo.<ref name="Outlaws" /> In [[3 ABY]],<ref name="OutlawsDate">{{OutlawsDate}}</ref> a HT-2200 carrying volatile cargo traveled to the [[space station]] [[Hauler's Keep]] located in the [[Khepi system]] of [[Wild Space]]. A message instructing the station's [[Maintenance droid|repair droids]] to standby to assess the ship was broadcast over the station's [[speaker]] system.<ref name="Outlaws" />

==Behind the scenes==
HT-2200s were first mentioned in [[canon]] continuity in the "A Pirate's Fortune" expansion for the [[Massive Entertainment]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Outlaws]]'',<ref name="Outlaws" /> which was released on [[May 15]], [[2025]].<ref name="Pirate's Fortune released">{{Ubisoft|url=en-us/game/star-wars/outlaws/news-updates/7ugpLQ1cukTrYcWgmIekyA/watch-the-new-trailer-for-star-wars-outlaws-a-pirates-fortune-releasing-may-15|text=Watch The New Trailer For Star Wars Outlaws: A Pirate's Fortune, Releasing May 15}}</ref> The ship type was mentioned in one of several ambient announcements that players can hear while on Hauler's Keep.<ref name="Outlaws" /> The ship was first introduced in the ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[Star Wars Legends|Legends]] continuity as the [[HT-2200 medium freighter]] in [[Wildfire (adventure)|"Wildfire"]], an adventure in the [[1996]] supplement book, ''[[The Kathol Outback]]'', for the ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' published by [[West End Games]].<ref name="Wildfire">{{DarkStryder|adventure=Wildfire (adventure)|book=The Kathol Outback|reprint=yes}}</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Outlaws]]'' {{1stm}} {{DLC|''A Pirate's Fortune''}}
